channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOJ refuses to issue signed declaration verifying 'Anti-Weaponization Fund' is dead
item.description: The DOJ has refused to issue a signed declaration from acting AG Todd Blanche verifying that it no longer intends to pursue President Trump’s "Anti-We...

item.title: Florida Attorney General discusses lawsuit accusing TikTok of targeting children and misleading parents
item.description: James Uthmeier shares his expectations for the lawsuit and outlines his next steps after vowing to pursue any party involved.

item.title: Several prominent Republican senators diverge from Trump on Iran agreement
item.description: Senator Ted Cruz described providing billions to Iran as a highly unwise move.

item.title: Two trains collide in England, resulting in multiple injuries, UK official reports
item.description: A passenger told BBC News they felt as if they had been in a bomb explosion after two trains collided north of London on Friday.
